user.title: Add E-Ink Display
user.description: Enter a name for this display. A unique token will be generated — copy it into your ESPHome config.

weather.clear-night: The sky is clear during the night
weather.cloudy: There are many clouds in the sky
weather.fog: There is a thick mist or fog reducing visibility
weather.lightning-rainy: Lightning/thunderstorm is occurring along with rain
weather.partlycloudy: The sky is partially covered with clouds
weather.snowy-rainy: It is snowing and raining at the same time
weather.sunny: The sky is clear and the sun is shining
